claim_support.reason: All material claims in the report are linked to authoritative cited chunk IDs or calc IDs. The text aligns with the content of the provided evidence blocks, satisfying the support requirement despite underlying calculation errors in the evidence itself.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical errors in key growth metrics. The report states Q2 2025 Revenue YoY growth as 36.27% (comparing $3.096B to $2.748B), but the actual YoY growth is ~12.7%; 36.27% represents QoQ growth. Similarly, Net Income YoY growth is stated as 316.88% (comparing $642M to $555M), but actual YoY is ~15.7%; 316.88% represents QoQ growth. These errors materially misrepresent performance trends.

citation_precision.reason: Citations correctly point to the specific evidence chunks and calculation objects that contain the stated figures. There are no mismatches between the claims and the authoritative IDs provided.

temporal_validity.reason: All news dates and financial periods cited are on or before the As-of date of 2025-08-11. No post-as-of information is used.

consistency.reason: The report is internally consistent across sections (Recent Developments, Financial Analysis, Business Analysis), repeating the same figures and narratives without contradiction, even though the growth calculations are systematically incorrect.

financial_numeric.reason: Skipped because the report failed the Accuracy Gate due to severe numerical errors.
